description: List of names of contributors and amounts of their contributions in figures, mentioning approximately 50 proper names, headed by the Nagid and including Manṣūr Ibn al-Lebdī. See Med Soc II, App C, 41. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
